title: Lummy's: Machinery Engineering
description: Get Machines Working and generate materials in your world
body:
# **Lummy's**:  _Machinery Engineering_
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4606c9b0abed2128f0615dd04de434aa22088fe2.png)

---

![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a5334d6096448c9c7ce0ec3291d40ad675cc6d3.png)

![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b746560b59c53f2f0512cd1c083212422f5bd5f.png)

![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269e19b12936ea1984433f33c93e79a8b67bd4a6.png)

---

# What's It's Main Content?
+10 New Materials
+30 Tools
Combat Ranged / Melee Weapon
Advanced Machines to Progress in your World
# What's It's Purpose?
This Mod adds machines. ore. tools & Mainly Machines. Go become the Engineer! By making the machines & exploring the caves and structures the mod additionally adds.
# What's The Goal?
The goal of this mod is to live Without Moving and the machines literally do everything for you! So, What Are You Waiting??
# Recommendation
i highly recommend you to download other [Lummy's: Mods Serie](https://modrinth.com/user/Lummy). it REALLY adds a Taste
---
